title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; pip install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed ‘Open WebUI’).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; Maven Central artifact.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async/sync bindings to the Ollama API.

title: Ollama-Gateway
summary: Cloudflare Worker that adds an OpenAI-compatible gateway in front of Ollama.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced CLI wrapper with interactive prompts and model management helpers.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot bringing Ollama models to servers via slash commands.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: NVIDIA GPU optimized Docker image with CUDA acceleration pre-configured.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional PVC & GPU node-selectors.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed request/response models.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that forwards channel messages to Ollama and posts replies.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for pipeline-based LLM tasks.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around the Ollama HTTP API with GenServer streaming.

title: ollama-macos-swiftui
summary: Native macOS SwiftUI menu-bar app that talks to local Ollama instance.
